title: T-116 — UI: CompositionBar (horizontal stacked %-by-ingredient bar) (NPD-g)
prompt:
# T-116 — CompositionBar slice

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx:230-250 (composition stacked bar inside RecipeScreen)
Prototype-index entry: recipe_screen (parent screen containing the inline composition bar)

## Goal
Single-component slice extracting the horizontal stacked composition bar from the prototype into a standalone Client Component. Each segment represents one ingredient (or ingredient category), width proportional to pct/totalPct, color-cycled from a 10-color palette. Below the bar a legend renders a swatch + 'name pct%' chip for each ingredient with pct > 0.5. Fully accessible (aria-label per segment + aria-live polite on the bar).

## Implementation contract
- apps/web/app/(npd)/formulations/[id]/editor/_components/composition-bar.tsx ('use client'). Props: { segments: CompositionSegment[] } where CompositionSegment = { id: string, name: string, pct: number, categoryColor?: string }.
- Render a 24px-tall flex container with border + rounded; each segment a div with style.width = `${(pct / totalPct) * 100}%` and background from segment.categoryColor or fallback palette by index.
- Legend below: flex flex-wrap gap-2 chips with 8px swatch + 'name pct%' text. Only segments with pct > 0.5 appear in the legend (prototype rule).
- Accessibility: each bar segment has aria-label='{name}: {pct}%'; container has role='img' aria-label='Ingredient composition'.

## Files (≤ 3)
- apps/web/app/(npd)/formulations/[id]/editor/_components/composition-bar.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/formulations/[id]/editor/_components/__tests__/composition-bar.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the bar renders with N segments summing to 100%, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/recipe.jsx:230-250 (composition bar), then segment widths match each segment's pct/totalPct ratio and colors cycle through the 10-color palette — verified by RTL inline style assertion
2. Given the parent formulation state changes (new segments prop), when the bar re-renders, then segment widths and legend update reactively — verified by RTL rerender test
3. Given the bar renders, then each segment has an aria-label '{name}: {pct}%' and the container has role='img' aria-label='Ingredient composition' — verified by jest-axe (0 violations) + RTL attribute assertion
4. Given the legend renders, then only segments with pct > 0.5 appear as chips, and each chip shows a colored swatch + 'name pct%' text — verified by RTL

## Test strategy
- RED: composition-bar.test.tsx asserting segment widths, palette cycling, reactive rerender, a11y aria-label, legend threshold — before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test composition-bar'

## Risk red lines
- Do not rely on color alone — aria-label per segment is mandatory
- Do not own composition state — controlled via props
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
